messages.content: Build a pure Decider for an Experiment aggregate in TypeScript. Support design, launch, and conclude commands. Launching a concluded experiment must throw a typed ExperimentError. Export initialState, decide, evolve, with exhaustive never defaults.

Implement a Decider for a Variant aggregate tracking a single A/B test arm. Commands: register, allocateTraffic, pause. Allocating more than 100 percent throws. Use a discriminated union, exhaustive never default.
Write a Decider for a Rollout aggregate. Commands: plan, advance to next stage, halt. Advancing past the final stage throws a RolloutError. Evolve with exhaustive matching.

Write a Decider for a FeatureFlag aggregate. Commands: create, enable, disable, archive. Archiving an enabled flag throws. Constraints: strict types, no any, typed error class, exhaustive never default.
How do I model an AudienceSegment aggregate as a Decider? Commands define, addRule, removeRule, seal. Sealing with no rules must throw. Minimal typed example please.
Explain briefly how a Decider isolates business rules for a HoldoutGroup aggregate, then show a working typed implementation with commands register, open, close.
Build a projection that folds TrialPhase events into a read-model view of current-phase counts per trial. Use project(view, event) and ignore unrelated events.
Create a read-model projection for ControlArm conversion rates. Project enrolled and converted events into a view. Events outside the view's interest return unchanged.
Add a dropout metric to this projection for Treatment events. Keep handled events exhaustive and skip unrelated domain events.
Write a projection that aggregates GuardrailMetric event values into per-metric min/max/count. Use project(view, event) with exhaustive switch.
Build a versioned Snapshot upgrader for an Experiment aggregate. Current version is 3. Write v1Tov2 and v2Tov3 upgraders. A loader runs upgraders in order.
How to upgrade a stored FeatureFlag Snapshot from v1 through v3 at load time? Minimal example with per-version upgrader functions.
Wrap a Rollout Snapshot upgrader in Effect.gen. Provide per-version upgraders and a loader effect. Use a local Snapshot type.

Write an appendToStream wrapper for a Variant aggregate with optimistic concurrency. Include a local EventStore interface, ConcurrencyConflict class, and expectedRevision typed as bigint or 'no_stream' or 'any'.
Using Effect.gen, append AudienceSegment events with optimistic concurrency. Surface ConcurrencyConflict as a tagged failure. Local EventStore interface required.
Build a write path for a SignificanceCheck aggregate that reads current revision, appends with expectedRevision, and converts a store mismatch into ConcurrencyConflict.
Build a CommandHandler for the Experiment aggregate that loads state from an EventStore, calls decide, and appends events with expectedRevision. Local EventStore interface.
Write a CommandHandler for FeatureFlag that orchestrates load-decide-append. No business logic in the handler itself.
Write a CommandHandler for the Rollout aggregate that wraps the read/decide/append cycle. Local EventStore interface.
Wrap a HoldoutGroup CommandHandler in Effect.gen. Load state, decide, and append events. Local EventStore interface, no any.
Build a runSubscription for TrialPhase events that resumes from a checkpoint. Include a local CheckpointStore interface and an async iterator of events.
Write a GuardrailMetric subscription runner. Checkpoint must be written AFTER the projection update for crash safety.
Build an Effect.gen-wrapped subscription for Treatment events with checkpoint resume. Local CheckpointStore interface.
Write a generic aggregateStream helper that folds Variant events into state, plus the matching when reducer. Use one exhaustion style per function.
Implement a synchronous aggregateStream helper for a ControlArm event array. Provide a when reducer and an initialState.
Produce a when reducer and aggregateStream-style helper for a FeatureFlag stream. Exhaustive matching with never default.
Refactor this inline fold into a reusable aggregateStream helper plus a when reducer for Experiment events.
Write an upcast function that migrates old Experiment event shapes to current ones. Use a version field on raw events. Throw UnknownEventError on default.
Write an upcaster for FeatureFlag events from v1 where 'flag-created' became 'FeatureFlagCreated' with an additional rolloutKey field in v2.
Implement a rebuild function that re-projects a Rollout read model from revision 0 in batches. Support resuming via a from parameter.
Write a chunked rebuild loop for an AudienceSegment read model. Must advance the revision cursor and persist progress after each batch.
Produce a minimal CQRS boundary for Experiment: handleCommand uses Decider + EventStore; queryView reads from a separate read store. Read store is eventually consistent.
Build a CQRS split for Variant with handleCommand and queryView. Keep write-state and read-state types independent, sharing only the event DU.
Write a stateless saga react(event) for Rollout that, on RolloutPlanned, emits a StartStage command; on StageCompleted, emits AdvanceRollout. Unrelated events return null.
Build a pure 3-step saga for TrialPhase: PhaseStarted triggers CollectMetrics; MetricsCollected triggers EvaluatePhase; PhaseEvaluated triggers ClosePhase. Events outside the saga return null.
Write a translate(domainEvent) pure function that maps Variant domain events into versioned IntegrationEvents. Events outside the outbox return null.
Build an outbox appendWithOutbox that transactionally writes Treatment events and outbox rows in one unit of work. Local transactional interface.
Fix this decide so it throws a typed FeatureFlagError when enabling an already-enabled flag, and exhausts the command union with a never default.
Explain briefly how a GuardrailMetric evolve reducer folds sample events into statistics, then show a minimal typed implementation.
Write a readStream-style async helper that pages SignificanceCheck events from an event store into an in-memory array. Constraints: strict types, no any, wrap the top-level for await.
